stemHtml: What would happen to an aircraft’s rate of descent and the angle of descent when deploying the speed brakes in flight?

options.a: The rate of descent will increase and the descent angle will decrease.
options.b: Both the rate of descent and the descent angle will decrease.
options.c: Both the rate of descent and the descent angle will increase.
options.d: The rate of descent will decrease and the descent angle will increase.
